name: ican-assistant
description: Unified macOS office copilot: routes requests to local Apple Mail (via AppleScript) or Feishu/Lark (via lark-cli + the lark-* skills — IM, calendar, docs, tasks, bitable, sheets, minutes & more, acting as the user), and orchestrates multi-step workflows like read docs -> summarize -> send email / create calendar event / create tasks.
